summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently using the hydrated preflight artifact. No security-sensitive refs were detected, and no close/merge/fix actions are safe or allowed for this shard. Each PR remains open for maintainer or author handling because the job blocks merge/fix/raise_pr and requires human review for maintainer signal, focused bug fixes, green checks, and technical correctness judgment.

actions.reason: Maintainer-owned draft work with unresolved ClawSweeper review and waiting-on-author status cannot be closed or advanced by this inventory worker.

The PR appears useful and well-scoped, but accepting the behavior change and merging it requires maintainer judgment outside this shard.
This is a larger user-facing CLI/session-state change with compatibility risk, so the inventory worker should not close or advance it without maintainer review.

This broad maintainer-labeled taxonomy PR has unresolved review-bot findings and overlaps with related taxonomy/skill work; deciding whether to keep, fold into #91452, or close as superseded requires maintainer judgment.
